action: Stop treating each screen as a fresh prompt; enforce connected loop
output: Root cause identified as workflow gap not model quality
anti_pattern: Blaming model and re-prompting without system lock

trigger: New project or first UI task in session
action: Read package.json lockfiles tsconfig next.config vite.config tailwind.config components.json
output: Stack profile: framework MUI version form lib table lib data fetching styling
anti_pattern: Guessing stack or generating generic React without project conventions

action: Run design-system generator or load design-system/MASTER.md apply industry palette typography tokens
anti_pattern: Random hex spacing and typography per screen

trigger: Stack ambiguous or multiple UI libraries
action: Present detected stack and ask confirmation only if conflicting signals
output: Confirmed stack profile saved in session memory
anti_pattern: Auto-installing packages or switching libraries silently

trigger: Starting a new page or major section
action: Pick one: existing Figma/code reference OR canvas exploration OR direct implementation with locked system
anti_pattern: Jumping straight to code without layout direction

trigger: New screen with unclear layout direction
action: Produce 3 distinct concepts on canvas or in structured markdown wireframes; name each concept
anti_pattern: Single vague prompt hoping first output is correct

action: Run v2 tighter layout v3 metric arrangement; keep versions comparable side by side
anti_pattern: Endless unstructured tweaks without comparison

action: Use locked screen as visual base; same spacing card rhythm chip style different content
anti_pattern: Re-prompting each screen from scratch

trigger: Before writing any new UI code
action: Inventory reusable components hooks stores tokens types constants services; note purpose props dependencies
output: Context graph note listing reuse targets per task
anti_pattern: File-name fuzzy match only; rebuilding Button Card DataTable hooks

action: Explicitly reference files folders and existing abstractions in plan or implementation
output: Reuse map: import X from Y use hook Z apply token T
anti_pattern: Creating duplicate Button variants utility files filter hooks

trigger: Business logic state across systems multi-step flows
action: Write editable plan: strategy files to touch reuse map states accessibility responsive breakpoints
output: Approved plan.md or inline plan block
anti_pattern: Jumping to code for dashboard + auth + API without architecture

action: Generate code using context graph imports only; all loading empty error states; MUI + RHF + TanStack standards
anti_pattern: Isolated code that looks fine but duplicates repo patterns

action: npx tsc --noEmit and project lint on touched files; fix before claiming done
output: Clean type and lint on changed files
anti_pattern: Shipping screenshot-quality code with TS errors

action: Run dev server; open localhost in browser MCP or ask user to preview
anti_pattern: Reviewing code only without rendered UI check

action: Snapshot or screenshot at 375 768 1024 1440; check overflow alignment chip padding
anti_pattern: Desktop-only review

action: Use browser snapshot; attach exact element selector computed styles issue; implement surgical CSS/layout fix not vague make it better
anti_pattern: Vague spacing feels off prompts without DOM reference

action: Ask browser to exercise sidebar filters submit empty states tablet misalignment
output: Flow test pass or issue list
anti_pattern: Assuming components work without interaction test

action: Pull console errors network failures from browser when debugging
anti_pattern: Fixing from description without console/network evidence

trigger: Token or pattern changed during implementation
action: Update design-system/MASTER.md or pages/*.md override
anti_pattern: Drift between code and documented tokens

action: Run pre-delivery checklist search.py domain pre-delivery-checklist
anti_pattern: Shipping without empty loading error states
